description_long: This is a compact, tactical-style rifle with a short, cylindrical barrel and a robust, matte-black finish. The body features a prominent upper Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the lower receiver appears to house a boxy magazine well. The grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling, while the trigger guard is large and rounded. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The rifle's proportions and features suggest it is designed for close-quarters or urban use, prioritizing maneuverability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, matte-black tactical rifle with a short barrel, ergonomic grip, and a prominent upper Picatinny rail for accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and ribbed grip texture.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, Picatinny rail, trigger, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the alignment of the upper rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barrel, rail, and grip from the other profile.
